summary: Continuous Learning Engines (Iteration 181) - All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - AI Learning page loads correctly with new Learning Engines section and Run All button visible.

design_issues.screen: AI Learning page - Recent Learning Events table
issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms all 4 continuous learning engines are correctly implemented:

1. continuous_learning_service.py: All 5 required functions present (detect_posted_drafts, propagate_cross_vendor_learning, auto_promote_confidence, learn_from_field_correction, run_all_learning_engines)

2. posting_patterns.py lines 454-498: All 5 new endpoints correctly implemented (/learning/run-all, /learning/detect-posted, /learning/cross-vendor, /learning/auto-promote, /learning/extraction-profile/{vendor_no})
3. LearningDashboard.js lines 31-123: LearningEnginesSection component correctly renders with button (data-testid='run-engines-btn') and results visualization for all 3 engine outputs
4. All engines return 0 counts in preview environment (expected - no real BC data to process)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Continuous Learning Engines feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/run-all returns valid structure with posted_draft_detection, cross_vendor_learning, confidence_auto_promotion, timestamp; (2) POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/detect-posted returns checked, posted_found, changes_learned, errors; (3) POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/cross-vendor returns corrections_checked, propagated_to_vendors, propagations_applied; (4) POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/auto-promote returns promoted (list), demoted (list), unchanged (int); (5) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning/extraction-profile/TUMALOC returns existing vendor profile; (6) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning/extraction-profile/NONEXIST returns empty profile {vendor_no, total_corrections: 0, field_corrections: {}}; (7) Frontend AI Learning page at /ai-learning renders correctly with LearningEnginesSection (data-testid='learning-engines-section') and Run button (data-testid='run-engines-btn'); (8) All existing sections still render correctly (reevaluate-section, learning-stats, confidence-breakdown, etc.)

POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/cross-vendor - Returns corrections_checked, propagated_to_vendors, propagations_applied - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/learning/auto-promote - Returns promoted, demoted, unchanged - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard - Still works after adding new engines - PASS
continuous_learning_service.py has all 5 required functions - PASS

Learning Engines Section (data-testid='learning-engines-section') found and visible - PASS
